subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath caused all created things to be manifest through the visible Point of His Most Exalted Pen, when the atoms gave utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی الکائنات بالنقطه الظاهره من قلمه الاعلی اذا نطقت الذرات
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
